# Bug Report

Thank you for taking the time to report an issue.

Before submitting:

* Confirm you are using the latest version of Kelan.
* Search existing issues to avoid duplicates.
* Include logs and reproduction steps whenever possible.

## Summary

Provide a short description of the problem.

Example:

> AITP backend starts successfully but fails to connect to the configured Ollama endpoint.

## Component

Which part of Kelan is affected?

* [ ] AITP Server
* [ ] AI Trust Engine
* [ ] Ollama Integration
* [ ] eBPF Enforcement
* [ ] PostgreSQL
* [ ] Dashboard
* [ ] Monitoring Stack
* [ ] Authentication
* [ ] Installation
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] CI/CD
* [ ] Other

## Environment

### Operating System

* [ ] Ubuntu
* [ ] Debian
* [ ] Kali Linux
* [ ] macOS
* [ ] Windows
* [ ] Other

OS Version:

Kernel Version:

Architecture:

```text
Example:
x86_64
arm64
aarch64
